steps: Log in or create a free Together AI account at https://api.together.ai/signup
On the API Keys page, click 'Create API Key'
Give the key a name (e.g. 'My Project')
Copy the generated API key — it is shown only once

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your Together AI API key, sent as a Bearer token in the Authorization header

notes: New accounts receive $5 in free credits upon sign-up
The API key is shown only once at creation — copy it immediately
Multiple API keys can be created per account for different projects
Compatible with the OpenAI SDK by changing the base URL to https://api.together.xyz/v1

test_endpoint.description: List all available models on the Together AI platform
